params.asset: The address of the underlying asset
params.onBehalfOf: Address receiving the debt (must have delegated credit)

params.asset: The address of the underlying asset
params.onBehalfOf: The address that will receive the aTokens

params.interestRateModes: Array of rate modes (0 = no debt, 1 = stable, 2 = variable)
params.params: Arbitrary bytes to pass to receiver

params.collateralAsset: The address of the collateral to liquidate
params.debtAsset: The address of the debt to repay
params.debtToCover: The amount of debt to cover
params.receiveAToken: True to receive aTokens, false for underlying
params.user: The address of the user to liquidate

params.amount: The amount to repay (use type(uint256).max for full debt)
params.asset: The address of the borrowed asset
params.onBehalfOf: Address of the user who will get debt reduced

params.amount: The amount to withdraw (use type(uint256).max for full balance)
params.asset: The address of the underlying asset

FLASHLOAN_PREMIUM_TOTAL().notice: Returns the flash loan premium (in bps)

MAX_NUMBER_RESERVES().notice: Returns the max number of reserves supported

borrow(address,uint256,uint256,uint16,ad.notice: Borrows an amount of asset with variable or stable rate

deposit(address,uint256,address,uint16).notice: Deposits an amount of underlying asset into the reserve

getReserveData(address).notice: Returns the reserve data for an asset

getReserveNormalizedIncome(address).notice: Returns the normalized income (interest accumulated) for a reserve

getReserveNormalizedVariableDebt(address.notice: Returns the normalized debt for a reserve

getReservesList().notice: Returns the list of initialized reserves

getUserAccountData(address).notice: Returns user account data across all reserves

liquidationCall(address,address,address,.notice: Liquidates a position if health factor < 1

withdraw(address,uint256,address).notice: Withdraws an amount of underlying asset from the reserve
